_comment: Per-1M-token USD prices Crowe Logic pays upstream. Keyed by 'provider:backend_name'. Sourced from public rate cards as of 2026-04-21. Hand-edit when vendors update. This file is read by cli/cost_model.py at startup and never shown to customers. Customer-facing pricing lives in customer_pricing.json.

_sources.kimi_direct: aggregator-sourced, confirm against platform.kimi.ai before production use

anthropic:claude-opus-4-6._note: Same rate card as 4-7. Update if Anthropic breaks them apart.

azure_openai:gpt-5.4._note: Rate card below 272K context window. At >272K context: input=5.00, output=22.50, cached=0.50.

openai_compat:moonshotai/kimi-k2.5._note: Aggregator-sourced. Confirm against Moonshot's platform before counting on these.

openai_compat:moonshotai/kimi-k2.6._note: Aggregator-sourced. Confirm against Moonshot's platform before counting on these.

ollama:kimi-k2.5:cloud._note: Covered by $20/mo Ollama Pro subscription. Effective per-token cost depends on usage volume; we attribute $20/mo across expected cloud-model turns.

ollama:kimi-k2.6:cloud._note: Same Ollama Pro subscription covers this.

nvidia:moonshotai/kimi-k2.5._note: Free on NVIDIA Developer Program, rate-limited ~40 RPM.

openai_compat:nvidia/llama-3.1-nemotron-._note: NemoClaw uses free NIM endpoint at the provider level. Actual VM cost is infrastructure (L40S ~$1-2/hr on Brev) allocated separately.

watsonx:ibm/granite-4-h-small._note: Billed in Resource Units on watsonx.ai; 1 RU = 1000 tokens. Public tier rate.

openrouter:*._note: Per-model cost passthrough. We pay a 5.5% top-up fee on credit purchases; that fee amortizes across all OpenRouter routes.

defaults._comment: Fallback when (provider, backend_name) is unknown. Conservative so unknown models don't under-report cost.
